issues.description: Backend taxonomy heuristics include the keyword 'e2e' as an integration signal, so file naming can drive classification rationale even when e2e is defined as tests/e2e path coverage.
issues.evidence: scripts/generate_milestone_a_baseline.py:39 includes 'e2e' in BACKEND_INTEGRATION_KEYWORDS and lines 170-175 classify by keyword; tests/artifacts/milestone-a-baseline.snapshot.json:255-258 classifies tests/test_e2e_flow.py as integration with rationale 'Filename contains 'e2e'' while classificationCriteria.e2e states tests/e2e path coverage.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for f8668e51f4b295f8465566c37cd9d48234885bd6. The implementation delivers the required baseline artifact, pass/fail/skip snapshot, skip-reason capture, top durations, and Milestone-A command matrix scoped to unit+integration; one non-blocking taxonomy-rationale consistency issue was identified.
